evals.name: kpi-quad-full-briefing
evals.prompt: Can you pull my action items, any deadlines, and a quick TLDR out of this Granola meeting? https://notes.granola.ai/t/65f9189e-8f09-4c98-823b-1ca6d162b054-008umkv4
evals.expected_output: A briefing with a TLDR, a 'Your action items' section listing only Frank's commitments, an 'Other action items' section with named owners, and a chronological timelines/deadlines section with relative dates resolved to real dates. No em dashes.
